
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 20. B.2 Deficiency replacement — supplying what is missing**

| Intervention | Condition | Effect | Source / note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Insulin | Type 1 diabetes | Life expectancy < 1 yr → near-normal | Banting/Best 1922 |
| Levothyroxine | Overt hypothyroidism | Symptom normalization; near-complete reversal | Standard of care |
| Vitamin B 12 | Pernicious anemia | Mortality ~90% → near-zero | Post-1926 |
| Vitamin D | Rickets | Disease resolution; near-complete prevention | Well-established |
| Iodine fortification | Goiter, cretinism | Near-elimination in iodine-replete regions | Public health |
| Iron supplementation | Iron-deficiency anemia | Hemoglobin and symptoms normalize | Cochrane |
| Folate fortification | Neural tube defects | ~30–50% reduction | US post-1998 |
| Enzyme replacement (Pompe, Gaucher) | Lysosomal storage diseases | Disease course fundamentally altered | Multiple trials |
| Growth hormone | GH deficiency | Near-normalization of growth | Pediatric endocrinology |
:::
